the highlighted section is: gobi desert

the gobi desert is one of the most famous tourist attractions in mongolia. it is a vast and arid region that covers parts of the country and is known for its unique landscapes, including sand dunes, rock formations, and ancient ruins. the gobi desert is also home to a variety of wildlife, including the elusive snow leopard and the rare bactrian camel. in addition to the gobi desert, other famous tourist attractions in mongolia include the ancient capital of khanbaliq, the sacred mountain of orkhon, and the beautiful lakes of lake khobii and lake khuiten. these sites offer visitors a chance to experience the rich history, culture, and natural beauty of mongolia.
